title: Run and reconcile a license scan
description: Produce an inventory with a scanner, then reconcile declared metadata against the actual LICENSE files.
body: Steps: 1. Run the ecosystem's scanner over the resolved lockfile (e.g. license-checker / pip-licenses / cargo-deny / scancode) to emit a component-to-license list. 2. For each component compare the declared metadata license to the SPDX identifier inferred from its bundled LICENSE text. 3. Record every mismatch, NOASSERTION, and multi-license case as a finding. 4. Resolve clear cases, escalate ambiguous ones. 5. Commit the reconciled inventory as the baseline. Rollback point: before overwriting the prior baseline. Validation: a re-run reproduces the same inventory with zero new unknowns.
